start_anchor.label: standing_start
start_anchor.notes: Canonical standing start pose for idle and other standing-family clips.

end_anchor.label: standing_end
end_anchor.notes: Canonical standing loop close for idle and other standing-family clips.

rules: All standing-family clips should preserve the captured standing silhouette at their start anchor unless intentionally diverging.
Standing-family loop clips should close back to the same standing baseline on their end anchor.
If a new standing pose is needed, create a new named pose action and a new baseline record instead of mutating this one.
